Importers¶

Base¶

Base importer class for flight record imports.

class pilotlog.importers.base.BaseImporter[source]¶

Bases: ABC

Base class for flight record importers.

abstractmethod async parse_file(file_path: Path) → list[ParsedFlight][source]¶

Parse a file and return a list of parsed flights.

source_name: str = 'unknown'¶
abstractmethod validate_flight(flight: ParsedFlight) → tuple[bool, str | None][source]¶

Validate a parsed flight. Returns (is_valid, error_message).

class pilotlog.importers.base.ImportResult(batch_id: str, filename: str, source: str, rows_processed: int = 0, rows_imported: int = 0, rows_skipped: int = 0, rows_duplicate: int = 0, errors: list[dict] = <factory>, new_block_minutes: int = 0, date_range_start: str | None = None, date_range_end: str | None = None)[source]¶

Bases: object

Result of an import operation.

property new_block_formatted: str¶

Format block time as HH

class pilotlog.importers.base.ParsedFlight(source: str, flight_date: str, flight_number: str | None = None, origin: str = '', destination: str = '', departure_time: int | None = None, arrival_time: int | None = None, block_minutes: int = 0, tail_number: str | None = None, aircraft_type_raw: str | None = None, aircraft_type: str | None = None, is_deadhead: bool = False, pic_takeoff: bool = False, pic_landing: bool = False, crew_position: str | None = None, crew_name: str | None = None, crew_id: str | None = None, remarks: str | None = None)[source]¶

Bases: object

A parsed flight record ready for database insertion.

SWA CSV Importer¶

Southwest Airlines CSV importer.

class pilotlog.importers.swa_csv.SWACSVImporter[source]¶

Bases: BaseImporter

Importer for Southwest Airlines CSV flight records.

async import_file(file_path: Path, session: AsyncSession) → ImportResult[source]¶

Import a CSV file into the database.

async parse_file(file_path: Path) → list[ParsedFlight][source]¶

Parse a SWA CSV file and return parsed flights.

source_name: str = 'swa'¶
validate_flight(flight: ParsedFlight) → tuple[bool, str | None][source]¶

Validate a parsed flight.
